visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young male with short dark brown hair is seen in a medium close-up shot, wearing professional black Sony over-ear headphones and singing into a high-quality condenser microphone with a black circular pop filter. He is dressed in a layered outfit consisting of a white inner shirt and a black zip-up jacket with white structural details. The background is a solid, light teal-colored curtain providing a clean, studio-like setting with bright, even lighting. (2) As the music builds in intensity, the singer's facial expressions become more emotive; he keeps his eyes tightly shut, and his mouth opens wide to hit high notes, reflecting high physical effort. He occasionally raises his left hand toward his chest or throat in a subtle gesture of emotional emphasis. (3) The camera remains largely static, focusing on his upper body and head, while the lighting remains consistent, highlighting the texture of his jacket and the metallic finish of the microphone stand. White text overlays representing subtitles appear at the bottom center of the frame throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 天地之闊予咱相擋. (2) [Subtitle]: 四季輪替替無咱兩個. (3) [Subtitle]: 我毋甘願 孤單留戀. (4) [Subtitle]: 親像孤鳥展翅咧飛. (5) [Subtitle]: 滿四界揣你的人佇佗. (6) [Subtitle]: 敢講註定我佮你無緣. (7) [Subtitle]: 將我靈魂 捶到必巡 我也無後悔. (8) [Subtitle]: 免傷清解釋 予人心鎮地. (9) [Subtitle]: 歲月再經過 誰攏袂放過. (10) [Subtitle]: 有一種緣份予人做伙.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male singer performing in a studio setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian male with short brown hair, wearing a black and white layered jacket and professional monitoring headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple and professional recording studio environment with a light teal or soft green curtain background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a powerful male vocal performance in the Hokkien dialect, characterized by high emotional arousal and a strong, belted delivery. The singer utilizes a wide pitch range, with noticeable vocal strain and breathiness used artistically for emotional effect. The background music features a driving pop-rock arrangement with a prominent drum kit, distorted electric guitars, and piano layers providing harmonic support. (2) Mid-way through, a transient shift occurs as the intensity drops slightly into a more melodic, lower-register verse, where the vocal tone becomes more intimate and breathy, and the percussive elements in the BGM become more subdued. (3) The performance concludes with a return to high-energy, high-pitch delivery, with the vocals soaring over a dense, harmonically complex musical bed before reaching a final resolved note.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a vocal performance showcase or a cover song recording, aimed at demonstrating the singer's emotional range and technical ability in the Hokkien pop genre.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-quality studio performance video focusing on vocal technique and emotional expression.
